items.title: RAG quality requires hybrid retrieval, provenance, and evaluation
items.summary: DinoBrain retrieval should evolve beyond lexical search toward contextual chunks, BM25 plus dense hybrid retrieval, rank fusion, reranking, durable source provenance, canaries, and behavior evaluation.

items.title: Task outcome: RAG verification subagent 09: verify Microsoft GraphRAG docs, compare graph-based RAG against ba
items.summary: Verified Microsoft GraphRAG docs and Microsoft Research pages for graph-based RAG vs baseline semantic snippet retrieval. Produced 6 claims with source URLs, confidence, implementation implications for DinoBrain graph/LLM Wiki/source lineage, and caveats. Read-only with no source file edits.
